Off Calendar Mar-08-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kenneth Ward, Esq., Archer, Norris, 925-930-6600, for defendants and moving parties Cynthia Lynn, Alex Herman, All Pets Hospital and Daniel Hershberger
Steven Bruce, People with Disabilities Foundation, 415-931-2828, propria persona plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D; DEFENDANT CYNTHIA LYNN, ALEX HERMAN, ALL PETS HOSPITAL AND DANIEL HERSHBERGER'S DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT-1st cause of action re intentional tort is sustained without leave to amend as to all defendants. 2nd cause of action re negligence is overruled as to Dr. Cynthia Lynn; otherwise sustained without leave to amend. 3rd cause of action re Breach of Contract-sustained without leave to amend as to all defendants. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

RULING:
